title: senecio obesus
intro: Senecio obesus, also known as the Velvet Geranium or Karoo Rose Chiffon, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an emetic and purgative, due to the presence of toxic compounds like senecionine and seneciphylline. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion, although its toxicity can be a concern if not handled properly. In herbal preparations, Senecio obesus is often used in small quantities, either as a dried herb or extracted into teas, tinctures, or infusions, typically in combination with other plants to minimize its toxic effects.
